briefdescription.para: Construct an SGP4 model from a TLE. Sets the output frame to GCRF by default.
Construct an SGP4 model from a TLE and an output frame. If TEME, the runtime is faster as no frame transformations are needed.

memberdef.argsstring: (const Array< TLE > &aTleArray, const Shared< const Frame > &anOutputFrameSPtr=Frame::TEME())
memberdef.name: SGP4

briefdescription.para: Construct an SGP4 model from an array of TLEs and an output frame.

detaileddescription.para: When multiple TLEs are provided, validity intervals are automatically generated using the midpoints between consecutive TLE epochs as boundaries. The first TLE's interval extends to the far past and the last TLE's interval extends to the far future.

parameterdescription.para: An array of Two-Line Element sets.
An output frame. Defaults to TEME.

memberdef.argsstring: (const Array< Pair< TLE, Interval >> &aTleIntervalArray, const Shared< const Frame > &anOutputFrameSPtr=Frame::TEME())
memberdef.name: SGP4

briefdescription.para: Construct an SGP4 model from an array of TLE-Interval pairs and an output frame.

detaileddescription.para: Each pair specifies a TLE and the time interval over which it is valid. When calculating states, the first TLE whose interval contains the requested instant is used. Therefore in the case an instant is within multiple TLE intervals, the first TLE whose interval contains the instant is used.

parameterdescription.para: An output frame. Defaults to TEME.

briefdescription.para: Copy constructor.
Destructor.
Copy assignment operator.

simplesect.para: A reference to this SGP4 model.

briefdescription.para: Clone this SGP4 model.

simplesect.para: A pointer to a cloned SGP4 model.

briefdescription.para: Check equality with another SGP4 model.

parameterdescription.para: An SGP4 model to compare against.

simplesect.para: True if the models are equal.

briefdescription.para: Check inequality with another SGP4 model.

parameterdescription.para: An SGP4 model to compare against.

simplesect.para: True if the models are not equal.

briefdescription.para: Check if the SGP4 model is defined.

simplesect.para: True if the model is defined.

briefdescription.para: Get the TLE associated with this model.
Get the array of TLEs associated with this model.

simplesect.para: The array of Two-Line Element sets.

briefdescription.para: Get the validity intervals associated with the TLEs.
Get the output frame of the SGP4 model.
Get the epoch of the SGP4 model.
Get the revolution number at epoch.
Calculate the state at a given instant.

parameterdescription.para: An instant at which to calculate the state.

simplesect.para: The orbital state at the given instant.

briefdescription.para: Calculate states at given instants.

detaileddescription.para: When multiple TLEs are provided, the selected TLE is first one whose interval contains the instant.

parameterdescription.para: An array of instants at which to calculate the states.

simplesect.para: An array of orbital states at the given instants.

briefdescription.para: Print the SGP4 model to an output stream.

parameterdescription.para: If true, display a decorator around the output.

briefdescription.para: Stream insertion operator.

simplesect.para: A reference to the output stream.

briefdescription.para: Equal to operator.
Not equal to operator.

simplesect.para: True if models are not equal.

briefdescription.para: SGP4 orbit model.

detaileddescription.para: Simplified General Perturbations 4 (SGP4) orbit propagation model using Two-Line Element (TLE) sets.
